item.title: Magda Szubanski’s new memoir Can’t Tell You But I Will set for release following battle with rare cancer
item.description: The comedian announced she was in remission in February.

item.title: Adelaide 36ers lodge formal complaint with NBL against Andrew Bogut after bitter title fight turns ‘personal’
item.description: The fiery NBL grand final series has taken another twist with officials lodging a formal complaint over the rival coach’s behaviour.

item.title: Morning Show host Larry Emdur sends strong warning after falling victim to AI-powered scam
item.description: ‘They’re liars and thieves.’

item.title: Kane Cornes accuses Zach Merrett of ‘giving up’ against North Melbourne
item.description: ‘I never thought I would see the day where that proud player would do this.’

item.title: Australia’s overseas fuel dependence sparks debate about making our petrol at home
item.description: The global oil crisis has kicked off calls for Australia to make our own, homegrown fuel. Experts say it’s not that simple.

item.title: eSafety Commissioner Julie Inman-Grant releases report accusing social media giants of dodging under-16s ban
item.description: Facebook, Instagram and TikTok are among the platforms facing fines of almost $50 million.

item.title: Arnold Schwarzenegger’s son Joseph Baena wins first bodybuilding competition
item.description: The former Mr Universe had the now 28-year-old child with his housekeeper.

item.title: Jackie ‘O’ Henderson sues Australian Radio Network alleging wrongful termination following Kyle Sandilands saga
item.description: Kyle Sandilands’ co-host has followed her former on-air partner into the courts.

item.title: Angelina Jolie sparks concern during Tom Ford event at Shanghai Fashion Week
item.description: While many praised her simple yet stylish look, some expressed concern about her health.

item.title: Australian Olympic swimmer Emily Seebohm asks mums on TikTok for help after ‘struggling’ with son’s sleep
item.description: The mum-of-one has asked other people for advice.

item.title: Israel passes controversial new death penalty bill targeting Palestinians
item.description: Australia joined France, Germany, Italy and the UK in voicing ‘deep concern’ for the bill.

item.title: Grammy award winner Celine Dion set to return to the stage after sad diagnosis of stiff-person syndrome
item.description: ‘Over the last few years, every day that’s gone by, I’ve felt your prayers and support.’

item.title: Australia rallies around former Home and Away actress Alea O’Shea amid brain cancer battle
item.description: Those close to the young Aussie woman have provided an update as she fights brain cancer.

item.title: Cricket Australia set to make shock contract calls as Todd Murphy returns while Jhye Richardson dumped
item.description: Cricket Australia are set to make a brutal call over a fringe Test paceman despite making his long-awaited return to the Australian team over the summer.

item.title: David Koch’s key tips to survive financial crisis as global markets tumble amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Here's what you need to know before making any rash decisions.

item.title: The most common painting mistake, according to the Three Birds Renovations team
item.description: Including the wall you're probably forgetting to paint.

item.title: Under-fire England opener Ben Duckett convicted of speeding in latest setback since drunken Ashes episode
item.description: The 31-year-old pleaded guilty just days after dropping a $400,000 contract.

item.title: Intercepted call and car travelling from Porepunkah helped police find Dezi Freeman before fatal stand-off
item.description: A tip-off from a member of the public appears to have led police straight to where the fugitive was hiding.

item.title: Ricky Ponting’s call pays off as Aussie young gun Cooper Connolly makes extraordinary IPL debut
item.description: The legend ‘went to the IPL auction with one player in mind’ and now that youngster is ‘the talk of the world’.

item.title: Tiger Woods announces he is ‘stepping away to seek treatment’ after pleading not guilty to driving under the influence
item.description: The troubled golf superstar has made a ‘necessary’ decision after entering a plea in court over his car crash.

item.title: Jane Bunn breaks down the weather forecast for the Easter long weekend in all capital cities
item.description: While most of the country is looking pleasant, one capital city could see 10mm rain totals on Saturday and Sunday.

item.title: Sam Konstas among five Aussies axed as Jake Weatherald promoted in contract shake-up
item.description: The 20-year-old has been dumped after a lean summer that saw him left out of the Ashes team.

item.title: Hugh Jackman and Deborra-Lee Furness relist penthouse with $14m price cut
item.description: The property now has the revised price guide of $43.3 million.

item.title: Wildlife warrior Bindi Irwin details years-long battle with endometriosis to raise awareness: ‘Don’t give up on yourself’
item.description: ‘If you’re in pain, my heart breaks for you. I believe you.’

item.title: How a new alert sparked an off-duty nurse’s dash to save a NSW driver in cardiac arrest - but anyone can be a hero
item.description: ‘I’ve been given my life back and I’ll now be there to walk my daughter down the aisle.’

item.title: Epic scenes as former Socceroos boss Graham Arnold leads Iraq to World Cup qualification
item.description: The veteran becomes the first Aussie coach in history to lead two different nations to a World Cup.

item.title: Hundreds of jobs at risk as Queensland seafood company Raptis collapses hours before Easter rush
item.description: Last-ditch efforts to save the company have fallen short.

item.title: Border collie reunited with owner Jessica Johnston after falling down New Zealand waterfall
item.description: The bedraggled and hungry pup spent a week surviving in the dense bushland.

item.title: Middle East conflict response: Prime Minister to announce $1 billion in interest-free business loans
item.description: ‘This is just another way we are acting to get ahead of issues.’

item.title: Middle East conflict: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s Address to the Nation lacked a ‘clear plan’
item.description: ‘What was the point of that?’

item.title: Unfiltered: Master coach Alastair Clarkson opens up on stress of AFL industry, and why he pushes on
item.description: The master coach has explained how he quickly put things in perspective during an ‘unbelievable’ storm.

item.title: Easter long weekend and Good Friday 2026 trading hours: When Coles, Woolworths, Aldi, IGA, Liquorland, BWS and Dan Murphy’s stores are open
item.description: Many stores are closed or have restricted hours over the long weekend - here’s everything you need to know.

item.title: Ex-Fleetwood Mac member Lindsey Buckingham doused with unknown substance in attack
item.description: The music legend was ambushed at an appointment.

item.title: Premiership coach Adam Simpson not completely ruling out Carlton job as pressure builds on Michael Voss
item.description: ‘Clearly this is playing around in Michael Voss’s head.’

item.title: Matildas superstar Mary Fowler signs insane $10m deal with iconic brand
item.description: ‘The big brands weren’t just trying to sign a footballer, they were after a cultural icon.’

item.title: NASA successfully launches first lunar voyage in decades
item.description: Four astronauts are aboard the Artemis II.

item.title: Coastal vs. Bush: Three Brisbane homes that feel like a holiday, but are closer than you think
item.description: Brisbane Twenty Five Minute Sanctuaries emerge for luxury

item.title: More heartbreak for Sam Kerr after Chelsea’s controversial Champions League loss to Arsenal
item.description: The Aussie was shattered as potentially her final chance at European glory was ended in controversial circumstances.

item.title: 'High rents, lower property value': where investors are eyeing in regional Australia
item.description: Finding the right location can really pay off.

item.title: Supercars CEO James Warburton suddenly quits two rounds into the season
item.description: The shock departure comes less than 12 months after he returned to the role for a second stint.

item.title: Prime minister Anthony Albanese announces crackdown on gambling in bid to reduce exposure to harms
item.description: ‘What we don’t want is kids growing up thinking that footy and gambling are the same thing.’

item.title: Major trial aims to detect Alzheimer’s earlier using online tests and blood screening
item.description: ‘We believe this has the potential to reduce the number of people developing dementia in the long run.’

item.title: Rare outbreak of nasty respiratory infection diphtheria prompts vaccination calls for kids
item.description: The disease was a common cause of death among kids until the 1940s.

item.title: Matildas issue explosive statement on Asian Cup prize money after request to work with AFC ‘ignored’
item.description: Players have been quietly seething for months and refused to stay silent any longer.

item.title: Sam Kerr’s reported move to NWSL upstart Denver Summit FC revealed hours after Chelsea’s Champions League exit
item.description: The Matildas captain is leaving England for a new start with a high-profile club.

item.title: DNA testing confirms Ted Bundy killed Utah teen Lauran Ann Aime in 1974 cold case
item.description: After more than 50 years, an unsolved murder of a Utah teenager has been linked to the serial killer.

item.title: Australia faces ‘sharp recession’ if US escalates Middle East war
item.description: If US President Donald Trump continues the war, Australians may see a bigger financial crisis.

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.description: Residents have recalled the scary moment the ‘very strong’ quake hit.

item.description: The vision shows the legendary golfer doing an embarrassing sobriety test, as detectives empty his pocket.

item.title: Farmers sound alarm on growing mouse plague across regional Australia
item.description: Small numbers are turning into large infestations within weeks.

item.title: Muslim-majority nations slam Israel’s death penalty law for Palestinians
item.description: The death penalty will not apply for Israelis convicted of the same crime.

item.title: Fuel crisis drives up demand for electric vehicles across Australia
item.description: Three times as many Aussies are test driving EVs since war broke out in the Middle East.

item.title: President Donald Trump fires US Attorney General Pam Bondi after bungled release of Epstein files
item.description: A former personal lawyer of Trump’s will now lead the Justice Department.

item.title: Easter long weekend: Double demerits now in force for drivers
item.description: Double demerit points are now in effect in New South Wales, Western Australia and the ACT over the Easter long weekend.

item.description: The Aussie driver’s pain is still there for everyone to see .. and now he’s revealed all.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s Easter Sunday message about time of ‘reflection’ and ‘joy’ amid Middle East war
item.description: ‘I wish you all a wonderful Easter.’

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Iran claims US aircraft C-130 shot down during pilot rescue mission
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Reece Walsh deletes rogue video during late-night hospital visit after Brisbane win over Gold Coast
item.description: The Broncos superstar then filmed himself again, this time giving a hand to a group of strangers.

item.title: New cars with the lowest power-to-weight ratios in Australia
item.description: Forget land-speed records and acceleration times, here are the new cars with the lowest power-to-weight ratios in Australia.

item.title: Eagles coach Andrew McQualter reveals reason behind Harley Reid ill-discipline
item.description: ‘Harley didn’t appreciate that.’

item.title: Reece Walsh set for facial surgery as Brisbane coach identifies two options to replace him
item.description: The Broncos have already started preparing for life without their superstar fullback.

item.title: St George captain Clint Gutherson says players are letting coach Shane Flanagan down
item.description: ‘We’re just not doing it.’

item.title: Delivery riders reeling at surge in e-bike and scooter thefts across Sydney
item.description: One rider said it happened in a matter of minutes while they were dropping off an order.

item.title: Man freed from car after being trapped in crash as three taken to hospital in Sydney’s Regents Park
item.description: One of the drivers was trapped in his car as it was smashed in from behind.

item.title: Tragedy on Queensland roads as four killed in Easter weekend crashes
item.description: A woman visiting from interstate was killed when a speeding ute crashed into her car head-on.

item.title: Tim Tszyu defies monster cut to defeat Denis Nurja as mega world title fight against Errol Spence Jr beckons
item.description: The Aussie star needed medical attention immediately after celebrating another career-boosting win.

item.title: Man charged after 160km high-speed police chase with baby in car through NSW Far West
item.description: The 160km-long chase began when he allegedly refused to stop for roadside breath testing.

item.title: Aussie legend Brian Goorjian leads Sydney Kings to dramatic NBL championship over Adelaide 36ers
item.description: The fiery grand final series went all the way down to overtime in the Easter Sunday decider.

item.title: Luckless star Luke Metcalf suffers fresh injury blow one week after comeback in Warriors’ defeat to Cronulla
item.description: The 27-year-old is set for more time on the sidelines in a bitter setback after last year’s disappointment.

item.title: Melbourne send major warning to the AFL with stunning upset over unbeaten rivals Gold Coast
item.description: ‘We’ve come to shock the competition. We’re having a good time out here.’

item.title: 7NEWS Kiss and Kill: Australian Government under pressure as the public calls for Clare’s Law domestic violence offender register
item.description: ‘You could very easily give someone a dangerous sense of security.’

item.title: Dezi Freeman dead: Murdered officer Neal Thompsons's sisters sue Victoria Police
item.description: The sisters of slain cop Neal Thompson claim they were ignored by Victoria Police.

item.title: Teen surfer escapes jaws of bronze whaler shark off South Australian coast
item.description: Experts say shark attacks in the area are rare.

item.title: Why camping isn’t the relaxing escape and connection with nature it promises
item.description: No sleep, no comfort and somehow more work than home, yet people keep going back.

item.title: Kmart and Target pull drink bottles from shelves over projectile lid danger
item.description: If you own one, here's what you need to know.

item.title: Essendon called out for baffling Marcus Bontempelli decision as Brad Scott coaching debate heats up
item.description: ‘You cannot accept that as the coach of this footy club.’

item.title: Robotic surgery breakthrough allows doctors to operate remotely across Australia
item.description: The technology is set to revolutionise healthcare for patients in remote areas.

item.title: Motorcyclist dies after becoming trapped under vehicle in South West Rocks, NSW
item.description: He is yet to be formally identified.

item.title: Western Bulldogs’ unbeaten start to AFL season spoiled by injury to ‘critical’ Tim English
item.description: A veteran teammate has put his hand up to fill in ‘just as long as we’re winning’ - but a difficult month looms large.

item.title: Nova FM host and former Australian Idol finalist Ricki-Lee Coulter reveals struggle with back pain
item.description: The 40-year-old took over as Nova’s Sydney breakfast co-host earlier this year.
